post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 219 - Gold Mafia


(Credits to mathjay for the poster)

Credits to the usual people for the ruleset.
  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.5: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
    • 1.6: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • 1.7: If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.8: Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • 1.9: Do not use the colors red (#FF0000), blue (#0000FF), green (#008000), purple (#9a00ff), or anything that appears similar, as these colors are used for modding purposes.
    • 1.10: Do not angleshoot.
    • 1.11: Do not reference any moderator communication.
    • 1.12: To confirm your participation in this game, PM me stating your role.
  • Voting/Hanging
    • 2.1: Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. For example, "Vote: fdas" and Vote: fDAs is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", “vote: fdas, Vote:fdas, Vote: fads, Vote: fdsa, and "Vote: fdas" are not.
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
    • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • 2.6: Votes must precise, including capitalization and spelling. The only exception to this rule is l and I, which will be treated the same.
    • 2.7: If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • 2.8: If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.9: If the deadline is met and no person is hanged, it will be considered no hang and will proceed to be twilight.
    • 2.10: The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
    • 2.11: During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.12: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person(s) hanged (if any) are officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.

  • Activity
    • 3.1: Each "day" will be 7 real life days long.
    • 3.2: Each "night" will be 2 real life days long.
    • 3.3: The deadlines will follow the official time.
    • 3.4: If you haven't posted for 72 hours, you will receive a PM prod.
    • 3.5: If you still have not posted for 48 hours after receiving a PM prod, you will be replaced.
    • 3.6: V/LAs must be declared in bold. If the V/LA is too long, you will be replaced instead.
    • 3.7: If you want to be replaced, you must also state so in bold.
    • 3.8: Do not flake.

  • Etiquette
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language.
    • 4.2: Do not make any personal attacks.
    • 4.3: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.4: Be mature.
    • 4.5: For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: bigmath is the mod of this game and Mathletesv is the co-mod.
    • 5.2: Red-colored text is used for mafia related posts.
    • 5.3: Green-colored text is used for town flavor-related posts.
    • 5.4: Purple-colored text is used for any other faction.
    • 5.5: Blue-colored text is used for mod posts.
    • 5.6: The moderators may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.7: The moderators has the last say in interpreting the rules.
  • Read all of the rules
Story (Credit to Mathletesv)
In a remote town, things had always been ordinary, and were expected to always remain ordinary. Fortunately or unfortunately, that was not the case when one day, something strange happened. A very valuable item was found. Gold.

Two friends were fishing in a river when they spotted the gold near the edge of the water. At first, the friends couldn't believe what they were seeing. bigmath swam in to check and saw that it was indeed the precious metal. And not just a little, either. A large gold deposit was hidden under a rock that had recently been broken down enough to see the gold under it. After pondering what to do, they decided to tell the rest of the town. If only jealousy and greed were fake.

"The early bird catches the worm."

I strongly believed in this, which is what lead me to wake up before everyone else to manage the gold. So far, everything had gone well. People were glad to have even the smallest portion of the gold, and many people had helped unearth it. I reached the river and checked to make sure all of the gold was there. Just then, someone ran from behind a tree, grabbed a sizeable block of gold, and ran off.
"Mine now!" he taunted. I knew that I shouldn't chase him, but I did anyway.
"Hey! Come back!" I ran after him, and we soon entered the alleyways of the town. Someone will see us soon and help catch him. He ran into the darkest alleyway in town, and I followed, even with my instincts begging me not to. He stopped at the end of the alleyway to catch his breath, or so it seemed. I caught up to him, but as I grabbed the gold from him, he stabbed me in the chest and I fell to the ground.

"The early bird catches the worm." Am I the bird, or the worm?
bigmath is dead. He was the Moderator (Town Gold Finder).

"Did you kill him?"
"Yes. And I got some gold while I was at it. Okay, so here's the plan. We kill off everyone else, split the gold, and leave this town forever. The 6 others should be easy to kill as long as they don't find any bodies or get suspicious."
"What about the sheriff? We should kill him as well so he can't catch us."
"All of that is trivial, all that matters now is how we'll split the gold. I say I should get 40% and the rest of you get 20%. That's fair."
"No!"
"Of course not!"
"Never!"
"Why not? After all, I am the leader, and the one who's doing the most work."
"Just because you're the leader doesn't mean you can take double the amount of gold!"
"Fine! I will kill all of you and take everything for myself then." He took out a knife and slashed at us. We tried to run away, but he threw the knife, striking me in the back. I fell to the floor in a pool of blood.

Mathletesv is dead. He was the Co-Moderator (Mafia Gold Finder).



Setup
  • The setup is a modified version of Even-Odd Killers. It consists of:
    5 Vanilla Townies
    1 Town Cop
    2 Even-Night Mafia Goons
    1 Investigation Immune Odd-Night Serial Killer
  • Cop checks print Town or Not Town. If they target the Serial Killer, it will print Town as well.
  • Mafia and Serial Killer can only kill on even and odd nights respectively, regardless of whether or not the Serial Killer or Mafia Goons are dead, contrary to the original setup.
  • Mafia do not have daychat.
Role PMs
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are a Vanilla Townie.
You are an ordinary member of a town that has been ordinary for as long as anyone can remember, and have always lived a peaceful life. Now that the gold has caused problems in the town, you are trying to help the sheriff find the murderers and bring peace back to the town. Your power lies in your voice and your vote.
You win when all threats to the town are eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are a Cop.
You have been a sheriff of the town for many years, yet there has never been anything more than a small conflict over petty things. Now, when your skills are finally needed to save the town, you are not able to do this by yourself. However, you still have some skills, which allow you to check the alignment of a player every night.
You win when all threats to the town are eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are an Even-Night Mafia Goon, along with your partner, [player].
After the recent events with the gold findings, you've decided that you want to take all of it, only to share it with your partner, [player]. Every even-numbered night, you and your partner can communicate with each other in this QuickTopic. Every even-numbered night, you may also send a member of your team to attempt to kill someone.
You win when the Mafia obtain a majority or nothing can prevent this from occurring.
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are an Investigation Immune Odd-Night Serial Killer.
Having decided to get the gold for yourself, you've decided to kill only on odd nights to not interfere with the mafia. The cop also believes you to be town, due to the fact that you left the mafia. Ever odd-numbered night, you may attempt to kill someone.
You win when you are the last player alive or nothing can prevent this from occurring.


Alive (1)
7. kevinmathz alpha_zom (Even-Night Mafia Goon)


Dead (8)
6. xzhang (Even-Night Mafia Goon) drowned in a river Day 1.
5. Osmium_ (Town Cop) was stabbed Night 1.
2. awesomeming327. (Vanilla Townie) was hanged Day 2.
4. Florinaapplezhu (Vanilla Townie) died Night 2.
9. mark888 (Vanilla Townie) died Night 3.
3. cw357 (Vanilla Townie) was hanged Day 4.
1. snoozingnewt (Investigation Immune Odd-Night Serial Killer) died Night 4.
8. lkarhat (Vanilla Townie) endgamed Day 5.


Events
Day 1 Begins
xzhang (Even-Night Mafia Goon) drowned in a river Day 1

Osmium_ (Town Cop) was stabbed Night 1

Day 2 Begins
alpha_zom replaces kevinmathz
awesomeming327. (Vanilla Townie) was hanged Day 2

Florinaapplezhu (Vanilla Townie) died Night 2

Day 3 begins
Nobody is hanged Day 3

mark888 (Vanilla Townie) died Night 3

Day 4 begins
cw357 (Vanilla Townie) is hanged Day 4

snoozingnewt (Investigation Immune Odd-Night SK) died Night 4

Game end


Warnings
 


Do not post until this line is crossed out.
Game is over.

post_rendered:
bigmath wrote:
Setup
  • The setup is a modified version of Even-Odd Killers. It consists of:
    5 Vanilla Townies
    1 Town Cop
    2 Even-Night Mafia Goons
    1 Investigation Immune Odd-Night Serial Killer
  • Cop checks print Town or Not Town. If they target the Serial Killer, it will print Town as well.
  • Mafia and Serial Killer can only kill on even and odd nights respectively, regardless of whether or not the Serial Killer or Mafia Goons are dead, contrary to the original setup.
  • Mafia do not have daychat.
Role PMs
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are a Vanilla Townie.
You are an ordinary member of a town that has been ordinary for as long as anyone can remember, and have always lived a peaceful life. Now that the gold has caused problems in the town, you are trying to help the sheriff find the murderers and bring peace back to the town. Your power lies in your voice and your vote.
You win when all threats to the town are eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are a Cop.
You have been a sheriff of the town for many years, yet there has never been anything more than a small conflict over petty things. Now, when your skills are finally needed to save the town, you are not able to do this by yourself. However, you still have some skills, which allow you to check the alignment of a player every night.
You win when all threats to the town are eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are an Even-Night Mafia Goon, along with your partner, [player].
After the recent events with the gold findings, you've decided that you want to take all of it, only to share it with your partner, [player]. Every even-numbered night, you and your partner can communicate with each other in this QuickTopic. Every even-numbered night, you may also send a member of your team to attempt to kill someone.
You win when the Mafia obtain a majority or nothing can prevent this from occurring.
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are an Investigation Immune Odd-Night Serial Killer.
Having decided to get the gold for yourself, you've decided to kill only on odd nights to not interfere with the mafia. The cop also believes you to be town, due to the fact that you left the mafia. Ever odd-numbered night, you may attempt to kill someone.
You win when you are the last player alive or nothing can prevent this from occurring.
@osmium

Setup

  • Cop checks print Town or Not Town. If they target the Serial Killer, it will print Town as well.

Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are a Vanilla Townie.
You are an ordinary member of a town that has been ordinary for as long as anyone can remember, and have always lived a peaceful life. Now that the gold has caused problems in the town, you are trying to help the sheriff find the murderers and bring peace back to the town. Your power lies in your voice and your vote.
You win when all threats to the town are eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are a Cop.
You have been a sheriff of the town for many years, yet there has never been anything more than a small conflict over petty things. Now, when your skills are finally needed to save the town, you are not able to do this by yourself. However, you still have some skills, which allow you to check the alignment of a player every night.
You win when all threats to the town are eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are an Even-Night Mafia Goon, along with your partner, [player].
After the recent events with the gold findings, you've decided that you want to take all of it, only to share it with your partner, [player]. Every even-numbered night, you and your partner can communicate with each other in this QuickTopic. Every even-numbered night, you may also send a member of your team to attempt to kill someone.
You win when the Mafia obtain a majority or nothing can prevent this from occurring.
Quote:
Welcome, [player], you are an Investigation Immune Odd-Night Serial Killer.
Having decided to get the gold for yourself, you've decided to kill only on odd nights to not interfere with the mafia. The cop also believes you to be town, due to the fact that you left the mafia. Ever odd-numbered night, you may attempt to kill someone.
You win when you are the last player alive or nothing can prevent this from occurring.

Flavor and Flip
Throughout the morning, we had all just joked around, not believing that there were actually murderers among us. But after more people saw the bodies, people had actually begun making serious accusations.
“I know who it is! It’s them!”
“No it’s them!”
“No you!”
“Guys we need to stop arguing pointlessly and figure out who we will kill today. Otherwise the killers will get away.”
“One person should talk at a time so other people can refute their claims.” No one spoke for a few minutes as they realized how much time had been wasted in their chaotic arguments. Finally, people tried using better reasons and putting more thought into their claims until eventually, they all settled on me. Oh no.
In a desperate attempt at survival, I tried to run into the forest near the river. If I get deep into the forest I should be able to evade them.
“Get back here murderer!” They rushed toward me in a stampede, and quickly caught up to me.
“I’ll tell you the others!" I cried in a desperate attempt at self-preservation. "They are-”

post_rendered:
Night 1

Story and Flip
The clock struck 12. I prowled towards my target’s house. I was pretty sure which side they were on, and now was my chance to be certain. As I rounded the corner, I heard a quiet sound behind me and froze. When I didn’t hear it again, I continued onward. It’s probably just some small animal. The house was just up ahead now, and the lights inside were all off. As I picked the lock to enter the house, a voice reached me from the shadows.
“Hello. You will make a great sheriff, finding me as you did now. Unfortunately you won’t be alive for it.”
It’s one of the killers. I was off like a flash, sprinting through the streets toward the safety of my home.
“In case you didn’t know yet, I can throw knives.” The murderer laughed as I lay motionless.

Osmium_ has been killed. They were the Town Cop.

post_rendered:
If there's no hang, and scum kills town, then sk will win if they can correctly identify the scum. If there's no hang, and scum kills sk, then town will win if they can correctly identify the scum. Either way, someone's deciding between a scummy town and the actual scum. So the scum will just kill the player who can make the best decision, and we win if that's the sk.

If we hang town we lose. If we hang sk we also lose because scum will kill a town. If we hang scum, then we have to hang the sk on the next turn or lose. In other words, we have one chance to kill the right person for each alignment.

So it comes down to how confident we are in our reads.
